form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation seventh of 12 at Churchill Downs Turf November 14 over 1106m, 5.5 len behind Heart Headed with 54.5kg at $14.94. When resuming last campaign eighth of 10 at Windsor June 9 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Regal Envoy carrying 64.5kg at $13. Top hope if back in good order.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign third of 7 at Southwell All Weather November 21 over 1000m, 1.0 len behind Sturlasson carrying 57kg at $11. form.formComment: Most recently 3rd of 9 at Newcastle All Weather on March 19 over 1200m, 2 len behind Fast Track Harry carrying 57.5kg at $7.50. The start before that sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 9 at Kempton Park All Weather on February 11 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind El Bodon with 59.5kg at $7.50. Working up to a win. Sure to be in the thick of things again.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation fourth of 9 at Southwell All Weather November 28 over 1000m, 2 len behind Alligator Alley with 63.5kg at $2.50. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by 1.0 len Southwell All Weather September 29 over 1000m defeating Ziggy's Triton with 61kg at $7. Anticipating a bright start to this prep.

form.formComment: Returns from a 53-day let-up. Last start ran on from midfield; 3rd of 14 at Meydan on February 20 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Run Boy Run carrying 55kg at $21. The start before that 8th of 13 at Meydan on January 16 over 1200m, 7 len behind Yotarid carrying 55.5kg at $31. Rates highly. Rates highly and is a top chance.
